title: The Problem with AI Agents No One is Talking About | Yutori, Abhishek Das
summary: Abhishek Das, co-founder of Yutori, critiques the AI agent industry for normalizing unreliability, noting that errors compound rapidly across multi-step workflows even at 90% per-step accuracy. He argues that building reliable agents requires strong taste, rigorous dogfooding, and architectural proof of work rather than raw performance optimization.
